query:
SELECT mesano, 
  RIGHT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),2) as aa,
  LEFT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),4) as mmxx,
  CONCAT('20', RIGHT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),2), LEFT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),4)) as aaaamm_raw,
  CONCAT('20', RIGHT(LPAD(CAST(mesano AS CHAR),6,'0'),2), LPAD(FLOOR(mesano / 100),2,'0')) as aaaamm_correct
FROM febraban WHERE empresa='FLEX' GROUP BY mesano ORDER BY mesano DESC LIMIT 8;
